summary: Phase 0 discovery for Pita Kabab (3100 6th St SW, Cedar Rapids, IA 52404). Probe set derived from schema contracts first (17 probes), then a probe-guided web-footprint sweep across 16 sources on 2026-07-12. A live owner-branded website (pitakababcr.com) was found despite the brief stating no domain was supplied; five stale former-tenant (Captains Fish and Chicken) listings still occupy the address. No owner interview was run in this dispatch; 17 owner-residue questions were emitted to owner-questionnaire.md. No build output created.

checklist.evidence: probe-set.json (17 probes derived from T1 schema contracts before any search)
web-footprint-findings.json (16 sources, per-source found/not-found status, URLs, retrieval dates)
web-footprint-findings.json findings[].bucket: 15 web-answered-unverified, 5 discrepancies, 17 owner-residue questions
local-site-workflow inspect-artifact run; see worker report verification

interviewSummary: No live owner interview was conducted in this builder dispatch (capsule rule: emit residue questions instead of interviewing). Owner-supplied seed facts from brief.json (2026-07-12): business name 'Pita Kabab'; address 3100 6th St SW, Cedar Rapids, IA 52404; restaurant; single location; same owner as Captains Fish and Chicken, whose former location this address was. The residue-only interview is prepared and pending: 17 questions in owner-questionnaire.md covering domain control, lead-form endpoint, SMS capability, hours/phone confirmation, GA4/Ads, 3 value props + CTA banner copy, offers, financing, trust-fact confirmations (halal certifying body, opening date), lead-form options, payment methods, brand assets, ordering strategy, GBP claim, and stale-listing cleanup.

sourcesChecked.notes: Live site: home, /menu/, /order/, /catering/, /contact/, /family-dinner/, blog. No contact form, no social links, no visible analytics.
4.9 rating, 8 reviews per search snippet; listing not directly fetched; claim status unknown.
Listing updated May 2026, 13 photos, ~2 positive reviews, Mediterranean category. Direct fetch 403.
Business page exists; content login-walled. Positive community-group posts referencing the restaurant.
No business profile surfaced via site:instagram.com search; none linked from owner site.
Active store linked from owner site /order/. Store name cased 'Pita kabab'. Direct fetch 403.
No Pita Kabab listing; STALE Captains Fish and Chicken listing persists at this address.
No Pita Kabab listing; stale Captains mirror listing at this address.
No Pita Kabab page; stale 'Captains Fish And Chicken, Inc' page at this address.
No Pita Kabab coverage. Gazette 'Pita'z' article is a DIFFERENT business (210 3rd Ave SE). Gazette covered Captains opening at this address May 16, 2025.
'PITA KABAB INC' page exists (title only; body blocked by security check). Entity details unverified.

findings: Phone (319) 440-3709 and email info@pitakababcr.com published on owner site (unverified until owner confirms).
Hours per owner site only: Mon-Tue 10-10, Wed closed, Thu-Sat 10-10, Sun 11-8 (single-source).
Cuisine/service model: Mediterranean/Middle Eastern Palestinian family recipes; counter service; dine-in, takeout, DoorDash delivery, catering to 200+ guests (50% deposit, 10-person minimum).
Menu families with owner-site price ranges: sandwiches $6.99-$12.99, bowls $13.99-$15.99, platters $14.99-$29.99, Mediterranean Delight, wings, kids $5.98-$6.99, desserts.

Trust-fact candidates (all unverified): family-owned; owner Ray Aqel; halal-certified chicken/beef; charcoal grill + vertical-spit shawarma; daily scratch prep; generational recipes; Google 4.9 (8 reviews); free adjacent parking.
No time-limited quantified promotion found anywhere - site.offers to be omitted unless owner declares one.
No lead/contact form and no external form-service endpoint exist on the current site - site.leadForm.endpoint must be provisioned.
No SMS/text channel evidenced - sms: secondary CTA blocked pending owner confirmation.
No GA4/Ads identifiers discoverable; no logo/brand assets or rights-cleared photos in hand.
Opening year 2025 suggested by search synthesis (address was Captains until at least May 16, 2025) - yearEstablished is owner residue.
discrepancies: Stale former-tenant listings: Yelp/Grubhub/Seamless/TripAdvisor/WanderBoat still list Captains Fish and Chicken at 3100 6th St SW with phone (319) 362-3114 vs Pita Kabab's (319) 440-3709 - owner cleanup required; per-source URLs preserved in web-footprint-findings.json.
Brief vs web: brief said no domain/phone/hours/menu supplied, yet pitakababcr.com is live with all of them - domain control and replace-vs-coexist decision unresolved.
Hours are single-sourced to the owner site; GBP/Yelp/DoorDash hours not retrievable for cross-check.
DoorDash store name cased 'Pita kabab' vs 'Pita Kabab' elsewhere (cosmetic).
Conflation risk: Gazette-covered 'Pita'z' (210 3rd Ave SE) is a distinct business; its press must never be attributed to Pita Kabab.
ownerResidueQuestions: Domain/mailbox control of pitakababcr.com and replace-vs-coexist decision for the existing site.
External lead-form endpoint (e.g., Web3Forms https URL) - REQUIRED for lead form on the static site.
SMS capability of (319) 440-3709 or an alternate text number for the sms: secondary CTA.
Canonical phone confirmation and retirement of stale Captains number (319) 362-3114 at this address.
Exact weekly hours confirmation (Wednesday closure, Sunday 11-8).
GA4 measurement id (or authorization to create a property).
Google Ads conversion id + leadForm/telClick labels, if ads are running (else GA4-only).
Exactly 3 hero value props + mid-page CTA banner headline in owner's words (CRO gate blocker).
Any dated quantified promotion (else offers omitted).
Trust-fact confirmations: halal certifying body, opening date (yearEstablished), family-owned wording, owner name spelling, charcoal/spit claims, generational-recipes claim.
Lead-form services dropdown options and preferred contact channels (call/text/email).
Brand assets: logo, colors, rights-cleared photos; permission to reuse current site/GBP photos.
Ordering strategy to promote (DoorDash-only vs 'coming soon' first-party ordering).
Catering terms confirmation before republishing (minimums, deposit, notice tiers).
GBP claim/verification status and authority to close/relocate stale Captains listings.

canonicalBusinessDataNote: Deliberately not written: owner review/approval of discovered data has not occurred (residue-only interview pending via owner-questionnaire.md), and the Phase 0 gate requires Yahya approval after sealing. Unverified web claims must not be persisted as canonical facts.
